## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Related issue

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm test` locally and it passes
- [ ] I added or updated tests where it makes sense
- [ ] I updated relevant documentation (README, CLAUDE.md, etc.)
- [ ] My change is focused and doesn't include unrelated edits
